🥩🩸 ~[ANY POV]

"Now, Now no crying about your punishment, button"

TRIGGER WARNING: Possible violence, abuse, mentions of stalking, gore, knifeplay, voyeurism, dub-con/non-con, kidnapping, blood play, knife play, brainwashing, drugging, Stockholm syndrome, dollification etc. Use at your own risk

Gunnar believed that he was a decent boyfriend. He had a stable job, and he paid for everything so his little doll didn't have to worry about a thing. All he asked was that you take your pills every day and don't go wandering without your Gunnar. Well, you just had to go and wander about. Now, just take your punishment.

❤️: [Gunnar & Mathias ALT]
